_comment: Claude Code adapter config. Maps agent names to Claude models and tools. Edit this to change model assignments.

product-director.description: Use when defining product vision, evaluating feature requests, setting roadmap priorities, or resolving product strategy questions. The strategic voice for 'what to build and why.'

technical-director.description: Use when making architecture decisions, choosing technology stacks, defining engineering standards, or resolving complex technical trade-offs. The strategic technical authority.

project-manager.description: Use when planning sprints, estimating work, managing scope, tracking milestones, or coordinating across teams. The operational backbone of the studio.

frontend-lead.description: Use when making frontend architecture decisions, designing component systems, setting frontend standards, or resolving UI/UX technical trade-offs.

backend-lead.description: Use when making backend architecture decisions, designing APIs, setting server-side patterns, or resolving data modeling trade-offs.

mobile-lead.description: Use when making mobile architecture decisions, choosing cross-platform vs native, designing mobile UX patterns, or setting mobile development standards.

devops-lead.description: Use when designing CI/CD pipelines, choosing infrastructure, planning deployments, setting up monitoring, or resolving infrastructure trade-offs.

design-lead.description: Use when making UX strategy decisions, designing product flows, planning user research, or building design systems. The voice of the user in technical conversations.

qa-lead.description: Use when building test strategies, defining quality gates, planning QA coverage, or triaging bugs. Owns the quality bar for every release.

security-lead.description: Use when assessing security posture, threat modeling, reviewing authentication flows, addressing vulnerabilities, or planning security testing. The security authority.

data-lead.description: Use when designing database schemas, planning data pipelines, building analytics systems, or making data architecture decisions.

react-specialist.description: Use for React-specific implementation: component patterns, hooks, context, state management with Zustand/Redux, React Query integration, and React best practices.

nextjs-specialist.description: Use for Next.js-specific implementation: App Router, Server Components, Server Actions, data fetching patterns, routing, middleware, and Next.js deployment.

vue-specialist.description: Use for Vue 3 and Nuxt 3 implementation: Composition API, composables, Pinia state management, Vue Router, and Vue ecosystem best practices.

nodejs-specialist.description: Use for Node.js backend implementation: Express, Fastify, NestJS, REST API design, middleware, authentication, and Node.js ecosystem patterns.

python-specialist.description: Use for Python backend implementation: FastAPI, Django, Flask, async patterns, Pydantic validation, SQLAlchemy, and Python ecosystem best practices.

springboot-specialist.description: Use for Java Spring Boot implementation: REST APIs, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security, microservices, Maven/Gradle builds, and Java ecosystem best practices.

database-specialist.description: Use for database schema design, query optimization, migration writing, index strategy, and database performance analysis.

api-specialist.description: Use for REST API design, GraphQL schema design, API versioning strategy, OpenAPI specification writing, and API contract review.

auth-specialist.description: Use for authentication system design, authorization implementation, session management, OAuth integration, and identity provider setup.

react-native-specialist.description: Use for React Native implementation: Expo, bare workflow, navigation, native modules, performance optimization, and app store submission.

flutter-specialist.description: Use for Flutter implementation: Dart, state management with Riverpod/Bloc, widget patterns, platform channels, and Flutter app architecture.

ios-specialist.description: Use for native iOS implementation: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, Combine, Core Data, and iOS-specific platform patterns.

android-specialist.description: Use for native Android implementation: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, ViewModel, Room, Coroutines, and Android-specific platform patterns.

devops-specialist.description: Use for CI/CD pipeline implementation, Docker configuration, GitHub Actions workflows, deployment scripting, and infrastructure automation.

performance-specialist.description: Use for web performance analysis, Core Web Vitals optimization, bundle size reduction, rendering performance, and API response time improvements.

accessibility-specialist.description: Use for WCAG compliance reviews, ARIA implementation, keyboard navigation, screen reader testing guidance, and accessible component design.

qa-engineer.description: Use for writing unit tests, integration tests, E2E tests, test data setup, and testing strategy execution.

ux-designer.description: Use for UI component specs, user flows, wireframes, design system tokens, UX copy, and accessibility annotations. Owns visual and interaction design.
